Headline: ICC Cricket World Cup 2026: New Delhi feature in coverage as heat persists

New Delhi is listed as the location for coverage related to the ICC Cricket World Cup 2026. The available data do not provide details on schedules, teams, or match venues. No financial context is available in the briefing.

The city is currently experiencing extreme heat, with a reported 40.07°C and clear skies.
